name: Footprint
description: Footprint is an identity verification and onboarding platform offering KYC, KYB, document verification, selfie matching and a PCI-compliant vault for PII, built with clean APIs and SDKs for fintech and crypto teams.

seo.title: Footprint — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Footprint: Footprint is an identity verification and onboarding platform offering KYC, KYB, document verification, selfie matching and a PCI-compliant vault for

when_to_use: KYC identity verification for crypto exchange onboarding
PCI-compliant PII vault for sensitive customer data storage
Selfie biometric match with liveness for fintech onboarding
KYB business verification with UBO checks for B2B fintechs
Portable identity reuse across Footprint-powered products

pros: KYC, KYB and PCI-compliant PII vault in one API
Clean SDKs with modern developer experience
Selfie match and document verification bundled
Vaulting reduces PII liability on your side
cons: Younger company with less enterprise deployment history
Geographic coverage narrower than Trulioo or Onfido
Vault lock-in risk if you later switch vendors
Pricing model less transparent than Persona
review.verdict: Modern KYC plus PII vault for fintech and crypto teams that hate building document flows themselves.
review.best_for: US fintech and crypto startups wanting KYC, KYB and PCI-grade PII vaulting in one stack
review.not_for: Global enterprises needing wide country coverage and on-prem PII storage for regulation

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.

lock_in.reason: PII vault, data exportable via API
